statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

article.description: McNeese State beats Abilene Christian 95-91 in OT
article.headline: McNeese State beats Abilene Christian 95-91 in OT
article.linkText: McNeese State beats Abilene Christian 95-91 in OT
article.story: LAKE CHARLES, La. -- Craig McFerrin and Keelan Garrett combined for 11 points in overtime as McNeese State thwarted Abilene Christian's upset bid, winning 95-91 Saturday. ACU, which has now lost 14 away games, led throughout the second half until Kevin Hardy made two free throws to tie the score at 80 with 16 seconds remaining. ACU had a chance to seal the victory, but missed three consecutive free throws in the final 50 seconds of regulation. McFerrin, who finished with 18 points, made four straight free throws to start the extra period for an 84-80 lead as the Cowboys (10-18, 8-8 Southland Conference) went on to take the win. Ledrick Eackles, who finished with a career-high 35 points for McNeese State, fouled out with 50 seconds remaining in regulation. Parker Wentz, who led ACU with 24 points, fouled out with 1:51 left in overtime. Julian Edmondson had 24 points for ACU (11-19, 2-11).
